title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0122
summary: 1 These cases carry forward another step the sequence in decision represented by Falbo, Billings, Estep and Smith.1 Each petitioner has been convicted for violating § 11 of the Selective Training and Service Act, 54 Stat. 96, restored to the docket for reargument before a full bench, 66 S.Ct.
